title: Grok lightweight video archive of multi-model screen sessions / attestation instrument
hypotheses: Sped-up video of real 3+ model operator desks can be recovered by Grok-class vision at useful accuracy
Public video post can act as a lightweight retrievable session archive stamp
Instrument must be tested on messy multi-pane sessions not only clean slides
Recovery must not be marketed as independent trusted attestation (net-zero trust)
non_claims: Grok trust net-zero with operator for final truth
trust_model: trust(Grok_oracle) approx trust(operator) approx 0 for money/truth; utility may be positive for OCR recovery only
